source_note: Preliminary Order of the Public Utility Commission of Texas identifying the issues (including prudence of fuel and purchased-power costs) in El Paso Electric Company's application to reconcile Texas-jurisdictional fuel, fuel-related, and purchased-power expenses for the reconciliation period April 1, 2022 through March 31, 2024. PUC Docket No. 57149 / SOAH Docket No. 473-25-05084, filed November 14, 2024. Listed for reference (metadata-only). Source: PUCT Interchange, document interchange.puc.texas.gov/Documents/57149_34_1442512.PDF.
